title: Sackpack
description: Modpack designed for a more enjoyable SMP experience.
body:
this modpack was made for personal reasons. it is made for use on a private modded server. this modpack aims to make it simple to connect to the server and also contains the mods that the server uses. if you are interested in this server for whatever reason, you may use the provided server modpack to create a server and distribute the client modpack for people to connect to the server.
"frequently" asked questions **what does this modpack add**
the modpack has a few general purposes - make gameplay a bit more exciting (e.g. sleepwarp, farmer's delight, comforts, serene seasons) - improve the game's visuals (e.g. 3d skin layers, iris shaders, not enough animations, particle rain, resource packs) - add useful utilities for players (e.g. appleskin, bactromod, freecam, jade, jei, zoomify) - enhance the performance of the game and the server (e.g. sodium, lithium, ferritecore, c2me) **why is this modpack public**
the reason this modpack is public is simply for convenient downloading and updating for players. **help i have a problem**
i do not care. **can i use this modpack for my own stuff**
feel free to do whatever you want with this modpack. make sure you respect the licenses of the modpack content though!
thanks to [fabulously optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [simply optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) for some config files.
